    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<TeamRole>
    TeamsService.getMemberRole(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID)
    Returns the role of the given player within the given team.
    Methods in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api with parameters of type TeamRole
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    TeamsService.addMember(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID, TeamRole role)
    Adds the given player to the given team with the specified role.
    boolean
    TeamsService.setMemberRole(UUID teamId, UUID playerUUID, TeamRole newRole)
    Changes the role of an existing team member.

    Methods in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event that return TeamRole
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TeamRole
    TeamLeaveEvent.getFormerRole()
    Returns the role the player held before leaving the team.
    TeamRole
    TeamRoleChangeEvent.getNewRole()
    Returns the role the player will be assigned after this change.
    TeamRole
    TeamRoleChangeEvent.getOldRole()
    Returns the role the player held before this change.
    TeamRole
    TeamJoinEvent.getRole()
    Returns the role that will be assigned to the player upon joining.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    enum 
    TeamRole
    Represents the role of a member within a Team.
    Methods in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model that return TeamRole
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TeamRole
    TeamMember.getRole()
    Returns the role this member currently holds within the team.
    static TeamRole
    TeamRole.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

    TeamRole.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model with parameters of type TeamRole
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    TeamRole.canManage(TeamRole target)
    Returns true if this role is permitted to manage (promote, demote, kick) a member of the given role.
    boolean
    TeamRole.outranks(TeamRole other)
    Returns true if this role has a higher priority than other.
